recommendations.title: The Strange Thing About the Johnsons
recommendations.overview: A suburban father gets trapped in a one-sided incestuous relationship with his abusive son.

recommendations.title: Hereditary
recommendations.overview: Following the death of the Leigh family matriarch, Annie and her children uncover disturbing secrets about their heritage. Their daily lives are not only impacted, but they also become entangled in a chilling fate from which they cannot escape, drivi

recommendations.title: Midsommar
recommendations.overview: Several friends travel to Sweden to study as anthropologists a summer festival that is held every ninety years in the remote hometown of one of them. What begins as a dream vacation in a place where the sun never sets, gradually turns into a dark nig

recommendations.title: Beau Is Afraid
recommendations.overview: Following the sudden death of his mother, a mild-mannered but anxiety-ridden man confronts his darkest fears as he embarks on an epic odyssey back home.

recommendations.title: High Noon
recommendations.overview: Will Kane, the sheriff of a small town in New Mexico, learns a notorious outlaw he put in jail has been freed, and will be arriving on the noon train. Knowing the outlaw and his gang are coming to kill him, Kane is determined to stand his ground, so

recommendations.title: Rio Bravo
recommendations.overview: A small-town sheriff in the American West enlists the help of a disabled man, a drunk, and a young gunfighter in his efforts to hold in jail the brother of the local bad guy.

recommendations.title: Blazing Saddles
recommendations.overview: A town—where everyone seems to be named Johnson—stands in the way of the railroad. In order to grab their land, robber baron Hedley Lamarr sends his henchmen to make life in the town unbearable. After the sheriff is killed, the town demands a new she

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.

recommendations.title: Sweetwater
recommendations.overview: In the late 1800s, a fanatical religious leader, a renegade Sheriff, and a former prostitute collide in a blood triangle on the rugged plains of the New Mexico Territory.
